code: import axios from'axios';import{buildApiUrl}from'./api';const ROOM_BOOKING_ENDPOINTS=['/api/room_bookings',buildApiUrl('/room_bookings')];const FOOD_ORDER_ENDPOINTS=['/api/food_orders',buildApiUrl('/food_orders')];const STAY_BOOKING_ENDPOINTS=['/api/stay_bookings',buildApiUrl('/stay_bookings'),'https://calebtonny.alwaysdata.net/stay_bookings.php'];const postCheckoutData=async(endpoints,payload)=>{let lastError=null;for(const endpoint of endpoints){try{return await axios.post(endpoint,payload,{timeout:10000,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});}catch(error){lastError=error;}}throw lastError;};export const submitRoomBooking=payload=>postCheckoutData(ROOM_BOOKING_ENDPOINTS,payload);export const submitFoodOrder=payload=>postCheckoutData(FOOD_ORDER_ENDPOINTS,payload);export const submitStayBooking=payload=>postCheckoutData(STAY_BOOKING_ENDPOINTS,payload);
